allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Cursos\\AppointVa\\Back\\AppointVaAPI"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --project AppointVaAPI/AppointVaAPI.csproj --no-build" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\api_seed2.txt" -NoNewWindow; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\api_seed2.txt" | Select-String -Pattern "creado|Aramis|servicios|empleados|clientes|citas|Recuperaci|Error|cargados" | Select-Object -First 25)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5048/api/auth/login" -Method Post -Body '{"email":"aramis@salon-aramis.com","contrasena":"Aramis123!"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $t = $r.token; $svcs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5048/api/servicios" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; $emps = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5048/api/empleados" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; $clis = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5048/api/clientes" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Output "Servicios: $\($svcs.Count\) | Empleados: $\($emps.Count\) | Clientes: $\($clis.Count\)")
